expected_behavior: A narrative episode where the boundary detector legitimately finds no candidates (stub_chapter_count=0 — modelling the production chapter_phase_no_candidates event). Pre-au2v.1: nothing happens — plan absent. Post-au2v.1: the phase still ran (per-episode overhead is charged) but emitted NO plan, so consumers cannot read a fabricated plan and inject a false-positive structural prior. This is the false-positive-removal contract: when there's no signal, the gate must not invent one.
synthesis_notes: Models a narrative monologue / produced narrative show whose audio shape doesn't yield clean chapter boundaries (low energy variance, sparse pause structure). The point is not the trace contents but the gate inputs: stub_chapter_count=0 represents the production no-candidates event class.
